name: UBA : Browsed to Communications Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
    http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%postcard%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%phon%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%bulletin%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%mail%' OR "Web Category" ilike '% search%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%forum%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%meeting%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%web host%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%communit%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%usenet%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%text/spoken%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%e-card%' OR "Web Category" in (29, 74, 76, 91, 98, 100, 108, 110, 112, 195, 196, 201, 222, 223, 224, 225, 226, 228) AQL filter query
